title: 02 tina sees the sky peel back
prompt: Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: cinematic storyboard reaction frame. Image 1 controls Tina, product, car, camera, neighborhood, and photographic realism. Image 2 supplies only the sky membrane concept. Tina looks upward through the window as wind catches the lifted corner. A broad strip of ordinary blue afternoon sky peels backward overhead with a thin translucent pink edge, revealing a deep fruit-night atmosphere beneath it: sparse lychee-like moons, a few botanical constellations, and enormous depth. Keep most of the street and sky ordinary so the moving boundary is legible. The car remains intact. Avoid decorative clutter and floating islands.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. Photoreal cinematic advertising with tactile real-world materials. The sky behaves as one peelable atmospheric membrane. Elegant, buoyant, and benign; no generic rainbow, candyland, explosion, disaster, captions, panel borders, watermarks, or extra characters.
